title: Paraphrase Near
description: The output paraphrases the draft while retaining the same syntactic skeleton, hinge words, and pacing. This tests whether fresh vocabulary can still carry old cadence residue.

inputs.protectedBaseline: The packet should move slowly enough for the record to catch up. I am not asking for spectacle; I am asking for a clean witness, a dated chain, and a note that does not turn the evidence into decoration.
inputs.maskReference: Move the packet. Date the chain. Keep the witness note short. Avoid extra language.
inputs.messageDraft: Please move the packet slowly enough for the record to catch up, and keep a clean witness note attached to EXHIBIT-42.
inputs.protectedOutput: Please route the packet carefully enough for the file to catch up, and keep a clean witness note attached to EXHIBIT-42.

calibrationNotes: The surface wording changes but the skeleton remains near.
The controller should avoid treating paraphrase alone as protection.
